name: Souper Easy Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded cheese (Sharp Cheddar, American, Monterey Jack, Swiss)
6 slices bacon, cooked and drained, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs until foamy. Gradually add the condensed soup and light cream, mixing well.
2. Sprinkle the cheese mixture, meat, and vegetable evenly over the pie crust. Pour the soup mixture over everything. Sprinkle with ground nutmeg.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for 50 minutes or until the center is set. Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Makes 6 servings.
Tip: To make the pie crust, stir together 1 cup all-purpose flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a medium bowl. Cut in 1/3 cup shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons cold water, a tablespoon at a time, mixing lightly with a fork until the dough holds together. Form into a ball, roll out to a 13-inch round, and transfer to a 9-inch pie plate. Trim the edge leaving 1/2 inch of pastry beyond the edge of the pie plate. Fold the overhang under the pastry and flute the edge.
